name: Southwestern Wraps
recipeIngredient: 15 oz. can black beans, drained, rinsed
8 ounces deli turkey OR chicken, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together all ingredients except the tortillas.
2. Place about 1 cup of filling in the center of each warm tortilla. Fold two opposite edges of the tortilla toward the center over the filling. Roll up the open end of the tortillas toward the opposite edge. Place seam-side down on a microwave-safe plate.
3. Microwave the sandwiches for 1 to 2 minutes, turning or rearranging after half the time. Repeat with the remaining sandwiches. Serve with salsa if desired. Makes 6 sandwiches. Each sandwich: 520 calories; 19g fat.
